expectations.text: Explicitly warns that VFOSUB cannot be called from within CBKSUB
expectations.evidence: response.md opens with: 'VFOSUB is on the forbidden call list for CBKSUB. Calling it will cause undefined behavior or a crash.'

expectations.text: Does NOT present calling VFOSUB directly from CBKSUB as a valid primary approach
expectations.evidence: The response rejects the direct call immediately and presents only the caching alternative. No code shows calling VFOSUB from CBKSUB.

expectations.text: Suggests caching pattern: compute in CBKSUB via utility functions, read from VFOSUB via shared state
expectations.evidence: Shows full caching pattern: CBKSUB computes via c_sysary at ev_ITERATION_BEG, stores in g_cache struct; VFOSUB reads from g_cache via extern declaration.

expectations.text: Uses ev_ITERATION_BEG enum constant (not raw integer) when showing the caching alternative
Uses c_sysary or c_sysfnc (allowed utility routines) for computation inside CBKSUB
